*Thanks for contributing! Please check the following things before submitting your PR :)*

  - [ ] PR message explains the context and design considerations and includes a link to the relevant issue(s) 💁‍♀️🖇️🧾
  - [ ] Commit messages are well-formatted
  (please follow [this guide](https://chris.beams.io/posts/git-commit/)) 📝📐
  - [ ] New features have test coverage 📋☑️☑️☑️
  - [ ] I am a human and I wrote this using my human brain. If LLMs or other nondeterministic tools were used in any capacity, explain below.
  - [ ] The app boots and pronoun pages are served correctly
  (`lein ring server` and `build.sh` should both succeed without errors) 👩‍💻🚀
